name: Weapon
description: Swords, axes, bows, and other offensive items

name: Consumable
description: Single-use items such as potions and scrolls

name: Trinket
description: Minor keepsakes and curiosities with no mechanical use

name: Document
description: Letters, maps, contracts, and written materials

name: Treasure
description: Coins, gems, art objects, and valuable goods

name: Key Item
description: Plot-critical items tied to quests or story beats

name: Misc
description: Anything that does not fit another category
